objective: Record the verified audit facts into the portfolio target's .company/memory (project-profile.md, modules.md, features.md, changelog.md), copying only evidence-backed facts and touching no product file.
acceptanceCriteria: project-profile.md contains a verified profile section (stack, runtime/Node engine, framework+version, package manager, key npm scripts, rendering model, notable libraries, deployment) sourced ONLY from the auditor report's profileFacts; nothing invented.
modules.md contains one concise section per module in the auditor report's moduleInventory, using the existing template fields, and marks status verified/hypothesis exactly as the auditor did.
The realtime-session API route and OPENAI_API_KEY boundary are recorded as a security/data boundary without any secret value; the config-file ambiguity is recorded as a hypothesis note.
features.md gains concise feature-to-file entries for the real user-facing features (interactive talking-avatar hero, portfolio content sections, SEO/OG assets).
changelog.md gains one dated entry noting the TASK-001 onboarding audit.
Only files under .company/memory/ are modified; no product file and no file outside memory is touched.
constraints: Copy ONLY evidence-backed facts from the auditor report. Do not add facts the report does not support. Preserve each hypothesis label.
Do not edit any product file, README.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, or anything outside .company/memory/.
Never write secret values, credentials, raw auth output, or machine-absolute paths; refer to files by repo-relative path.
Keep entries concise per the memory templates; do not duplicate the generated index graph.
